title: sida ciliaris
intro: Sida ciliaris, also known as the spiny sida or spiny prickpoppy, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). Traditionally, Sida ciliaris has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. Sida ciliaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although its efficacy may vary depending on the quality of the preparation and the individual's health condition.
